name: Kootu (Vegetables with Split Peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the split peas and drain them well.
2. Place the peas in a small saucepan with 1-1/2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and partially cover the pan. Cook for about an hour until the peas are tender but not mushy. Ensure that not all the water evaporates before turning off the heat.
3. Wash and peel the potatoes. Dice them into small pieces. Add the diced potatoes to a large saucepan with turmeric, cayenne, and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and cover. Simmer for 7-8 minutes.
4. Stir in the cooked peas, shredded cabbage, chopped chili peppers, and salt. Cook over moderately high heat until the cabbage is just tender.
5. Add grated coconut and ground cumin, then lower the heat and simmer for a couple of minutes.
6. Heat oil in a small frying pan. Add mustard seeds, urid dal, and rice. When the dal turns red, add everything to the vegetables.
